form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr4) over 2130m at Gloucester Park, beaten 13 m by Miss Uneek (2:36.80) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 on April 7 at $101. Before that, 7th (40m Fr1) over 2503m at Gloucester Park, beaten 14 m by Brewery Lane (3:16.60) in NR up to 80 on March 31 at $81. Right in contention.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 6th (Fr5) over 2130m at Gloucester Park beaten 11 m by Miss Uneek (2:36.80) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 on April 7 at $14. At the previous start 9th (Fr3) over 2130m after showing early pace at Gloucester Park beaten 16 m by The Wildcard (2:38.10) in 4yo+ NR 55 to 69 on March 20 at $6.50. No surprise to see him bounce back to form.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (20m Fr2) over 2503m at Bunbury, beaten 10 m by Blameitonthenight (3:11.70) in NR up to 80 on April 4 at $12. form.formComment: Last start a big 6 m win after showing early speed, (Fr3) at this track (1:22.90) beating Halfmoonbay in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 6 at $3.20. In the right form and can score again.
